This dashboard monitors TLS and configuration health:
- TLS certificate expiry (certificates expiring soon)
- TLS traffic by version and cipher
- Configuration reload success and failure tracking
- TLS request volume over time
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "8d4a937f-f276-f205-d041-e1d8b78c22b7", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "8d4a937f-f276-f205-d041-e1d8b78c22b7"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "TLS Certs Near Expiry", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "a41c5775-bce1-be30-475f-aa265adb1aaf", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "33225d7f-b06d-b0f8-bf35-83733f8b3bbf", "showBar": false}, "query": {"esql": "FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
